label: Commodity Trend
signal: Long each commodity when its 12-month return is positive, else flat.
description: 12-month time-series momentum on commodities: long when 12m return > 0, else flat. Equal weight. v1 universe was only gold+oil (proxy data); v2 multiasset extends to the ETF universe incl. a real-assets sleeve (REITs+MLPs).
reference: Moskowitz, Ooi & Pedersen (2012), 'Time Series Momentum' — commodity leg
